name: How much is my broken arm from work worth in Draper?

mainEntity.name: How much is my broken arm from work worth in Draper?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Value depends on medical costs, lost wages, disability duration—no fixed formula.** Utah covers economic damages; settlements vary by case.[5] Key factors: Calculate 66 2/3% wages, future care. Pre-existing issues reduce. Lawyer estimates via comps. Avoid early settlements without advice.
